pairs.question: When and where was Anthony Wayne Teachey born?
pairs.answer: Anthony Wayne Teachey was born on March 27, 1962.

pairs.question: Which college did Anthony Wayne Teachey attend for basketball?
pairs.answer: Anthony Wayne Teachey played college basketball at Wake Forest University.

pairs.question: What were Anthony Wayne Teachey's rebounding and scoring averages as a senior in the ACC?
pairs.answer: As a senior, Teachey led the Atlantic Coast Conference (ACC) in rebounding with an average of 10.0 rebounds per game and scored 13.1 points per game.

pairs.question: What notable achievement did Teachey earn during his senior season in college?
pairs.answer: During his senior season, Teachey earned second-team All-ACC honors.

pairs.question: In which year did Teachey participate in the Olympic trials, and did he make the final roster?
pairs.answer: Teachey was invited to the 1984 Olympic trials but did not make the final roster.

pairs.question: Which NBA team drafted Anthony Wayne Teachey, and in which round?
pairs.answer: Teachey was drafted by the Dallas Mavericks in the second round of the 1984 NBA draft (40th pick overall).

pairs.question: What career path did Teachey choose after being drafted by the Dallas Mavericks?
pairs.answer: After being drafted by the Dallas Mavericks, Teachey chose to sign with a professional team in Italy instead.

pairs.question: How did Anthony Wayne Teachey stay involved in basketball after retiring as a player?
pairs.answer: After his playing career ended, Teachey worked with children in sports in his hometown of Goldsboro, North Carolina.
